name: WritersProof for Notion
tagline: Cryptographic authorship attestation for every page, doc, and wiki entry
description: WritersProof for Notion adds cryptographic authorship attestation to your team's knowledge base. As you compose pages, documents, wiki entries, and database records in Notion, WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of human authorship without storing content — only SHA-256 hashes. Teams using Notion as their source of truth for documentation, proposals, and decision records can prove that critical content was genuinely human-authored. Each attested page carries a verifiable evidence chain that any stakeholder can independently verify through the WritersProof verification portal.
features: Real-time evidence capture during page and document composition in Notion
Per-page attestation status accessible via Notion integration panel
Workspace-wide attestation analytics showing coverage across teamspaces
Database property integration displaying attestation status per record
Multi-author attribution with individual attestation per contributor
Notion API webhook integration for automated verification on page update
Export attestation summaries for compliance, audit, and procurement workflows

requirements.platform: Notion (Business or Enterprise plan for integration capabilities)
requirements.integration_type: Notion API (OAuth 2.0) with internal integration support
requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
